title: Cheaper Netherite Smithing Templates
description: Adds in a recipe that reduces the cost and increases the availability of Netherite Upgrade Smithing Templates.
body:
The Function

A basic one recipe Data Pack that adds a recipe to increase the availability of Netherite Upgrade Smithing Templates.


The Purpose

The changes in to smithing tables 1.20 had a mixed reception with the community. Some people welcomed the changes, while others were exceptionally upset with how much harder it was to get Netherite gear. This Data Pack hopes to solve that problem by adding in a recipe that uses materials that otherwise have no use to create Netherite Upgrade Smithing Templates.


The Recipe
